one_time_description: Reclamation costs recorded as expense with no budget amount - non-recurring item
economic_notes: Louis Bull Services operations generating ~$2.9M revenue. Bear Hills Casino Limited Partnership and 677626 Alberta Ltd accounted for by modified equity method. First Nation Development Funds active. Ottawa Trust Funds held by Government of Canada. Asikiw Mostos O'pikinawasiwin Society excluded from consolidation due to unavailable audit evidence.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) Asikiw Mostos O'pikinawasiwin Society was excluded from consolidation as audit evidence was unavailable - this entity had a $22.9M payable on the balance sheet suggesting it is material; (2) not all asset retirement obligations have been estimated and recorded. Large $22,943,320 payable to Asikiw Mostos O'pikinawasiwin Society dominates accounts payable. Accounts receivable from ISC jumped from $185K to $21.9M year over year. Reclamation costs of $5,597,023 appear to be a one-time non-recurring expense. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $22,579,715 + CMHC $565,833 + ISETS $856,553 = $24,002,101 (ISETS treated as government transfer). Two GBEs: 677626 Alberta Ltd and Bear Hills Casino Limited Partnership. One fully consolidated subsidiary: Kiseputinow Holdings (1996) Ltd.
